home.title: Welcome to AnLNM Website
home.authenticatedDescription: Explore all the features available to you as a logged-in user.
home.description: A modern, fast, and scalable web application built with Next.js 14, featuring server-side rendering, internationalization, and beautiful UI components.

fastPerformance.title: Lightning Fast Performance
fastPerformance.description: Built with Next.js 14 and optimized for speed with server-side rendering and static generation.

globalReady.title: Global Ready
globalReady.description: Full internationalization support with multiple languages and locale-specific formatting.

modernStack.title: Modern Tech Stack
modernStack.description: Powered by React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and the latest web technologies.

darkMode.title: Dark Mode Support
darkMode.description: Beautiful dark and light themes with seamless switching and system preference detection.

facebook.noPostsDescription: There are no Facebook posts to display at the moment.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We are committed to providing quality education and fostering a supportive learning environment for all students. Our mission is to inspire, educate, and empower the next generation through innovative teaching methods and community engagement.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be a leading educational institution that nurtures creativity, critical thinking, and character development. We envision a future where our students become confident, responsible, and successful contributors to society.
